case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. HILARIO G. PENARANDA et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT OF DILIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PENARANDA, HILARIO G.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PENARANDA, HILARIO G. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2013
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE RETURN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-24-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
POS; AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PENARANDA, HILARIO G.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-24-2013 CONTINUED TO DEC-24-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-24-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-24-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
